missed_changes: Heavy new emphasis on EigenLayer/restaking and 'cryptoeconomic security' as an unbundling primitive (led Series B) — a specific bet the prediction didn't name
Named NEAR as 'the epicenter for AI x crypto' — a specific ecosystem call not anticipated
Led Espresso Series B on shared-sequencing/rollup coordination as the concrete fix to fragmentation
notes: The modular/L2/cross-chain, ZK, and AI×crypto theses are strongly and repeatedly confirmed through investment announcements (EigenLayer, Espresso) and ZK references (Jolt, CSX). The fragmentation concern is explicitly confirmed in the Espresso post. Risk-on/architecture-over-tokens posture confirmed via abundant 'just the beginning'/'LFG' building enthusiasm; the off-bucket safetyism worry also resurfaced ('Patronizing safetyism'). DePIN, DAO/coordination primitives, decentralized media, and the casino/memecoin concerns were simply not addressed in the window (absent, not contradicted). No claims were contradicted.
